commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR decomposes the legacy cron super-tool into nine per-action cron tools, keeps the legacy cron alias, and wires the new tools into agent, MCP, policy, catalog, display, and regression-test surfaces.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level problem: current main has one flat CronToolSchema, and PR head narrows that model-facing surface while adding new cron_* names. The remaining blockers are also source-reproducible because the shared mutation and successfulCronAdds classifiers still only recognize the legacy cron path.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can update the cron family safety classifiers and schema required-key tests without a product decision.
